bounded_memory.description: Peak RSS does not scale linearly with input size
bounded_memory.method: Linear regression on peak_rss for large + extra-large tier (1MB, 5MB, 10MB, 64MB+), slope < 0.5 bytes/input_byte
bounded_memory.insufficient_data_policy: If data points < min_data_points, verdict is INSUFFICIENT_DATA (treated as FAIL)

ttfb_improvement.description: Streaming TTFB is significantly earlier than full-buffer conversion completion time
ttfb_improvement.method: For large tier, streaming ttfb_ms < full-buffer p50_ms * 0.5

no_regression_small_medium.description: No unacceptable regression on small/medium tier

streaming_supported_parity.description: Streaming-supported corpus output is byte-identical to full-buffer output
streaming_supported_parity.method: All fixtures in streaming-supported corpus must have 100% parity

fallback_expected_correctness.description: Fallback-expected corpus correctly triggers pre-commit fallback
fallback_expected_correctness.method: All fixtures in fallback-expected corpus must return fallback signal in Pre_Commit_Phase and produce correct output via full-buffer
